mapper.select: /** UsptEvlMfcmmDao.selectList */ select a.evl_mfcmm_id , a.evl_cmit_id , a.extrc_mfcmm_id , a.login_id , a.enc_password , a.use_bgnde , a.use_endde , a.refresh_token , a.charmn , case when a.charmn = true then '평가위원장' else '평가위원' end as charmn_nm , a.atend_sttus_cd , a.atend_dt , a.evas , a.evas_resn_cn , c.expert_nm as evl_mfcmm_nm , c.wrc_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm a inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b on a.extrc_mfcmm_id = b.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert c on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlMfcmmDao.selectEvlAtendList */ select uem.evl_mfcmm_id , ue.expert_nm as evl_mfcmm_nm , uem.charmn , uem.atend_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('ATEND_STTUS', uem.atend_sttus_cd ) as atend_sttus_nm , uem.evas_agre_at , uem.enc_password from uspt_evl_mfcmm uem inner join uspt_expert ue on ue.expert_id = uem.expert_id where uem.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlMfcmmDao.selectCharmn */ select uem.evl_mfcmm_id , uem.evl_cmit_id , uem.extrc_mfcmm_id , uem.expert_id , uem.enc_password , uem.use_bgnde , uem.use_endde , uem.refresh_token , uem.charmn , uem.atend_sttus_cd , uem.atend_dt , uem.evas_agre_at , uem.evas_resn_cn , uem.creator_id , uem.created_dt , uem.updater_id , uem.updated_dt from uspt_evl_mfcmm uem where uem.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and uem.charmn = true
